quotesDataList.quote: Frontend development is a combination of art and engineering.
quotesDataList.author: Unknown Author

quotesDataList.quote: Programming is not just about solving problems; it’s about learning how to solve them better.
quotesDataList.author: Peter Norvig

quotesDataList.quote: The function of good software is to make the complex appear simple.
quotesDataList.author: Grady Booch

quotesDataList.quote: The most important property of a program is whether it accomplishes the intention of its creator.
quotesDataList.author: C.A.R. Hoare

quotesDataList.quote: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs.
quotesDataList.author: Unknown Author
